entries.name: localization
entries.description: Override the plugin's default localization strings.

entries.name: path
entries.description: URL segment for the organizations settings view.

entries.name: organizationSettingsPath
entries.description: URL segment for `/organization/...` profile and danger zone tab.

entries.name: organizationMembersPath
entries.description: URL segment for `/organization/...` members and invitations tab.

entries.name: logo
entries.description:
Organization logo upload, optimization, and deletion configuration.
Same shape as {@link AvatarConfig} used for user avatars (`AuthConfig.avatar`).

tags.name: default
tags.text: { enabled: true, resize: resizeAvatar, size: 256, extension: "png" }

entries.name: roles
entries.description:
Map of role keys to display labels. Merged with the built-in defaults
(`owner`, `admin`, `member`) so you only need to declare the labels for
any custom roles your Better Auth server adds (e.g. `manager`,
`billing`). Looked up at render time via `roles?.[role]`.
